text: You hijack a plane by accident and got paid by the local terrorist organization.
You pretend to be injured after a car nearly hit you and take the driver the court.
You accidentally join a cult and reported them to the police, who give you an reward.
You robbed a single mother with a family of 6.
You fake your death and collect your insurance money!
You have a 25 hour shift working at the local McDonalds.
You open open up a can of beans and you find money inside.
You fake being a cancer survivor for pity money.
You hijack someones device and transfer their money into your bank account.
You work very very very very very very very very very very very very hardddddddddddddddddddd.
